phrases.intent_en: Where is the Schlossberglift vertical lift?
phrases.cultural_note: In Austrian tourist settings, lift locations are typically indicated by staff counters or signs near the boarding area.

likely_response.translation_en: To the right of the clock tower.

responses.english: To the right of the clock tower.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I get evening event wristbands?
phrases.cultural_note: Evening event wristbands are typically distributed at a staffed counter before entry.

likely_response.translation_en: At the counter in the evening.

responses.english: At the counter in the evening.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Stadtwiese meadow viewpoint?
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Aussichtspunkt auf der Stadtwiese?
phrases.cultural_note: Open meadows like Stadtwiese are accessible via main paths; no precise micro-location cues are supported.

likely_response.translation_en: Behind the clock to the left.

responses.english: Behind the clock to the left.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Kasematten café inside the casemates?
phrases.text_local: Wo finde ich das Café in den Kasematten?
phrases.cultural_note: Cafés in historic casemates are usually signposted along the main pathways.
